---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behavior 
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

# Description
A clear and concise description of the bug and the context in which it occurs.

# Guidelines
Before submitting, please verify:
- [ ] The bug is reproducible consistently
- [ ] You have checked that no existing issue already reports this bug
- [ ] You have included all relevant logs and error messages below

# Steps to Reproduce
1.
2.
3.

# Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

# Actual Behavior
A clear description of what actually happened. Include screenshots, logs, or error output if available.

# Environment
- **Layer affected:** <!-- Backend / Frontend / IoT -->
- **OS:** <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24, Windows 11, macOS -->
- **Version/Commit:** <!-- e.g. v0.9.0 or commit hash -->
- **Docker version:** <!-- if backend related -->
- **Node/Expo version:** <!-- if frontend related -->
- **PlatformIO version:** <!-- if IoT related -->

# Task List
- [ ] Reproduce and confirm the bug
- [ ] Identify the root cause
- [ ] Implement and test the fix
- [ ] Verify the fix does not introduce regressions
